name: Skill Provenance
description: Cross-surface provenance tracking for OpenClaw skills — verify authenticity, integrity, and chain of custody with sha256-verified bundles and 22-eval test suite.
review: Exceptional documentation and best-in-class security posture. The only author-side cross-surface provenance skill in the catalog at v4.7.2 with 22 verified evals. SHA256-verified bundles, clean MANIFEST.yaml, pure convention (no network deps). High uniqueness fills a genuine gap.
